TypedExtensionsWithFkWhereClauseT, TParent Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Configures a dynamic WHERE clause that limits the objects that can be assigned as a foreign-key value.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Typed
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static ICrudMethod<T> WithFkWhereClause<T, TParent>(
	this ICrudMethod<T> method,
	TypedRelationData<T, TParent> relation,
	IFkWhereClauseProvider whereClauseProvider
)
where T : ITypedEntityWrapper
where TParent : ITypedEntityWrapper

method
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.CrudICrudMethodT
Base method
relation
Type: TypedRelationDataT, TParent
whereClauseProvider
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DefinitionIFkWhereClauseProvider
WHERE clause provider

T
TParent

Return Value

Type: ICrudMethodT

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type ICrudMethodT. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
